detaileddescription.para: Class to accumulate points and make best line / plane approximation Generated from class MR::PointAccumulator. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Class to accumulate planes to find then their crossing point Generated from class MR::PlaneAccumulator. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PointAccumulator_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_PointAccumulator_DestroyArray(). Use MR_PointAccumulator_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_PointAccumulator_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::PointAccumulator::PointAccumulator. Parameter _other can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PointAccumulator_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_PointAccumulator. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_PointAccumulator. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter _other can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it held previously.

Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::addPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object.

computes the best approximating plane from the accumulated points Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBestPlane. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Plane3d_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBestPlanef. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Plane3f_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

computes the best approximating line from the accumulated points Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBestLine. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Line3d_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBestLinef. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Line3f_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

computes centroid and eigenvectors/eigenvalues of the covariance matrix of the accumulated points Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getCenteredCovarianceEigen. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter centroid can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter eigenvectors can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter eigenvalues can not be null. It is a single object.

Parameter eigenvectors can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter eigenvalues can not be null. It is a single object.

returns the transformation that maps (0,0,0) into point centroid, and maps vectors (1,0,0), (0,1,0), (0,0,1) into first, second, third eigenvectors corresponding to ascending eigenvalues Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBasicXf. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::getBasicXf3f. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns 4 transformations, each maps (0,0,0) into point centroid, and maps vectors (1,0,0), (0,1,0), (0,0,1) into +/- first, +/- second, +/- third eigenvectors (forming positive reference frame) corresponding to ascending eigenvalues Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::get4BasicXfs. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::get4BasicXfs3f. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::PointAccumulator::valid. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

Adds in existing PointAccumulator all given points Generated from function MR::accumulatePoints. Parameter accum can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter points can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.name: MR_accumulateWeighedPoints

detaileddescription.para: Adds in existing PointAccumulator all given weighed points Generated from function MR::accumulateWeighedPoints. Parameter accum can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter points can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter weights can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

Adds in existing PointAccumulator all mesh face centers with the weight equal to face area Generated from function MR::accumulateFaceCenters. Parameter accum can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter mp can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

Adds in existing PointAccumulator all line centers with the weight equal to the length line Generated from function MR::accumulateLineCenters. Parameter accum can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pl can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

Adds in existing PointAccumulator all points from the cloud (region) with weight 1 Generated from function MR::accumulatePoints. Parameter accum can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pcp can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PlaneAccumulator_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_PlaneAccumulator_DestroyArray(). Use MR_PlaneAccumulator_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_PlaneAccumulator_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_PlaneAccumulator *_this, const MR_Vector3d *p0, double tol, int *rank, MR_Vector3d *space)
memberdef.name: MR_PlaneAccumulator_findBestCrossPoint_MR_Vector3d

detaileddescription.para:
computes the point that minimizes the sum of squared distances to accumulated planes; if such point is not unique then returns the one closest to p0
tol
relative epsilon-tolerance for too small number detection
rank
optional output for solution matrix rank according to given tolerance
space
rank=1: unit normal to solution plane, rank=2: unit direction of solution line, rank=3: zero vector Generated from method MR::PlaneAccumulator::findBestCrossPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p0 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rank defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter space defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_PlaneAccumulator *_this, const MR_Vector3f *p0, float tol, int *rank, MR_Vector3f *space)
memberdef.name: MR_PlaneAccumulator_findBestCrossPoint_MR_Vector3f

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::PlaneAccumulator::findBestCrossPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p0 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rank defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter space defaults to a null pointer in C++.
